books.title: Dialogues
books.author: Plato
books.summary: A collection of Plato’s dialogues.

books.title: The Blue Lagoon
books.author: H. de Vere Stacpoole
books.summary: After a shipwreck, two surviving children are stranded on an island paradise, experiencing its bounties and resources, facing the dangers of the natural world, and undergoing their own maturation and romance.

books.title: Confessions of an English Opium-Eater
books.author: Thomas De Quincey
books.summary: A portrait of the life of a drug addict in Georgian-era London.

books.title: Personal Recollections of Joan of Arc
books.author: Mark Twain
books.summary: A fictional biography of Joan of Arc from her early teenage years to her martyrdom.

books.title: Anne of Green Gables
books.author: L. M. Montgomery
books.summary: A coming-of-age story of a young girl growing up on a farm on Prince Edward Island.

books.title: The Crock of Gold
books.author: James Stephens
books.summary: A philosopher sets out to rescue the beautiful Caitilin Ni Murrachu from the god Pan in an adventure that involves leprechauns, Celtic gods, policemen, and philosophical disquisitions both profound and absurd.

books.title: King Lear
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: An aging king divides his kingdom between his two eldest daughters, slighting the third, and comes to bitterly regret his decision.

books.title: The Water of the Wondrous Isles
books.author: William Morris
books.summary: A beautiful woman escapes a life of servitude under an evil witch to adventure through a series of magical islands.

books.title: Cakes and Ale
books.author: W. Somerset Maugham
books.summary: An author is placed in a dilemma when he’s approached to provide background for a biography of a novelist with whom he’s had a relationship.

books.title: The Magician
books.author: W. Somerset Maugham
books.summary: A young engaged couple meet a mysterious man who claims to have practical knowledge of the occult.

books.title: My Disillusionment in Russia
books.author: Emma Goldman
books.summary: Emma Goldman recounts her experiences living in the early Soviet Union.

books.title: The Greene Murder Case
books.author: S. S. Van Dine
books.summary: Philo Vance investigates a series of apparently-senseless shootings in the home of a wealthy New York family.

books.title: A Pluralistic Universe
books.author: William James
books.summary: A philosopher gives an introduction to radical empiricism and how it relates to the experienced world.

books.title: Essays
books.author: Errico Malatesta
books.summary: A collection of essays by Errico Malatesta.

books.title: The Book of Jade
books.author: David Park Barnitz
books.summary: A collection of decadent poetry by David Park Barnitz.

books.title: Looking Backward
books.author: Edward Bellamy
books.summary: A man falls asleep in 1887 and wakes up over a century later in a socialist utopia.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Henry Kuttner
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Henry Kuttner, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.summary: The world’s first consulting detective investigates a variety of intriguing cases in the first Holmes short story collection.

books.title: Heretics
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: A collection of essays in which G. K. Chesterton debates the intellectuals of his day on a range of topics.

books.title: The Giant Raft
books.author: Jules Verne
books.summary: A former slave trader with an encrypted note schemes about its meaning, while a man with a secret past travels with his family down the Amazon in a giant raft to attend his daughter’s wedding.
